data.title: BNB price jumps 6% to $1,095 on technical breakout, strong rally with volume surge and bullish momentum signs.
data.description: The value of Binance Coin surged by 5.99% within a 24-hour period, reaching $1,094.90. This surge saw it surpassing crucial resistance points with a significant increase in trading volume. Technical indicators are currently pointing towards a sustained bullish trend, indicating potential for further growth.

data.title: Isomeric Industries Inc acquires Big Spring Rail Systems in Big Spring, Texas to advance industrial development, effective Sept 15, 2025.
data.description: A significant announcement was made in Big Spring, Texas, on October 3, 2025, when Isomeric Industries Inc., a prominent provider of oilfield chemicals across the U.S., revealed the successful acquisition of Big Spring Rail Systems, Inc. The acquisition officially took place on September 15, 2025. Big Spring Rail Systems is responsible for managing and operating...

data.title: Ethereum price at $4,474.66, up 1.93% in 24 hours, maintains strong technical setup above key levels. MACD bullish.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum stands at $4,474.66, reflecting a 1.93% increase in the last 24 hours. data.title: Bitcoin value spikes to $77.4B in Strategy’s treasury, rivalling major banks and matching some countries’ GDP. BTC hits $120K.
data.description: The Bitcoin treasury of Strategy has reached a total of $77.4 billion, exceeding the treasury holdings of significant banks and matching the GDP of several countries.

data.title: Ferrari will host Capital Markets Day on Oct 9, 2025 in Maranello. Sharing updates with NYSE/EXM: RACE.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Maranello, Italy, Ferrari N.V. (NYSE/EXM: RACE) announced that it will be holding its Capital Markets Day in the same location on October 9, 2025.

data.title: Joe Lubin confirms SWIFT to use Linea for new payments system on Ethereum's layer 2 blockchain.
data.description: The co-founder of Conensys, Joe Lubin, has announced that SWIFT will utilize the Ethereum layer 2 Linea blockchain to develop its cryptocurrency payments ledger.
